The '''Alliance Supreme Allied Commanders''', or simply '''Supreme Commanders''', were the senior [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Military/Legends|military]] officers commanding the various military branches of the Rebellion.

===Supreme Allied Commanders===
The seven Supreme Allied Commanders and their functions were:

*'[[Rebel Fleet Command/Legends|''Fleet Command''']] (Fleet)—the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] of combat warships and attached support units.
*'''[[Ordnance and Supply/Legends|Ordnance and Supply]]''' (OaS)—weapons, equipment and supply procurement, and also R&D
*'''[[Starfighter Command (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Starfighter Command]]''' (StarCom)—administrative oversight of starfighter forces and pilot training; only a few "rogue" squadrons were under the direct operational control of StarCom
*'''[[Support Services/Legends|Support Services]]''' (Support)—bases, staging areas, supply ships, safeworlds, and manufacturing centers
*'''[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]]''' (Intell)—espionage and analysis
*'''[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]''' (SpecForces)—the Alliance's ground troops
*'''[[Sector Command (Alliance)/Legends|Sector Command]]''' (SecCom)—oversight over the semi-autonomous [[Sector Force/Legends|Sector Forces]] controlled by governments and resistance groups that pledged allegiance to the Alliance

==The Commanders==
The identities of the following Supreme Allied Commanders are known. While each held the rank of Supreme Allied Commander, formal address varied.

*[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]—Fleet
*[[Ral'Rai Muvunc]]—OaS
*[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]—StarCom
*[[Vernan (general)|Vernan]], succeeded by [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]—Intell
*[[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]—SpecForces
